hero.title: Your dreams are not just wishful thinking.
hero.subtitle1: TripNARA turns "I want to go" into a route you can truly finish — and when you need a team, matches through Trusted Projects and project-fit assessment.
hero.subtitle2: Route direction, risk, executable schedules, and four-layer trust governance — one decision logic; no composite credit score.
hero.microCopy2: Dreams become executable plans; trust becomes four verifiable layers.

card1.title: First judge: Should this route exist?
card1.description: Instead of stuffing more attractions into the schedule, we first confirm whether the direction is reasonable, reachable, and executable.

card2.title: Completable each day, not just a list of points
card2.description: TripNARA generates executable schedule structures based on travel duration, stops, rhythm, and buffer.

card3.title: If circumstances change, it won't fall apart
card3.description: Closed? Weather? Insufficient energy? The system automatically generates optimal replacement solutions.

card4.title: Verifiable teams — not credit-score rankings
card4.description: Join through Trusted Projects and tiered project-fit assessment — replaces public plaza recruitment.

testimonial1.quote: I finally finished a whole route without the plan falling apart mid-trip.
testimonial1.author: Ming Z.

testimonial2.quote: As a certified Professional Organizer, Trusted Projects + fit assessment makes team formation feel grounded — not stranger credit scores.
testimonial2.author: Hua L.

problem.title:

personas.title: Three Partners Helping You Make Better Travel Decisions

abu.name: Abu
abu.title: Safety & Boundary Guardian
abu.subtitle: Polar Bear Polar Guardian
abu.tagline: I'm responsible: Can this route really be taken?
abu.description: Serious but gentle, not rushing for speed, always taking you to safe places
abu.details: Weather · Altitude · Vehicle condition · Capability matching
abu.why: Big, stable, calm. Natural survival expert with a protective nature. Softer than lions and tigers, more trustworthy.
abu.personality: Serious but gentle · Not rushing for speed · Always taking you to safe places
abu.visual: Guardian, steady, patient · Slight frown, thoughtful · Colors: serene blue/glacier white · Elements: shield·snow·road signs

dre.name: Dr.Dre
dre.title: Rhythm & Energy Designer
dre.subtitle: Mountain Shepherd Dog
dre.tagline: Don't push too hard, I'll make every day just right.
dre.description: Considerate, rhythmic, stable, caring. Not leading from the front, but guiding the pace from the side, both smart and gentle.
dre.details: Best at: Taking care of the team's overall rhythm
dre.why: Not leading from the front, but guiding the pace from the side, both smart and gentle. Best at: Taking care of the team's overall rhythm.
dre.visual: Gentle·detailed·reliable · Light smile/thoughtful · Colors: forest green/soft brown · Elements: beat lines·heartbeat curves

neptune.name: Neptune
neptune.title: Repair & Alternative Space Magician
neptune.subtitle: Navigation Otter
neptune.tagline: If it doesn't work, I'll give you a perfect alternative.
neptune.description: Smart, flexible, creative, empathetic. Good at solving problems, always finding alternatives, with a healing nature.
neptune.details: Understanding what you really want → Providing gentle new paths
neptune.why: Flexible·smart·curious. Good at solving problems, always finding alternatives. Has a healing nature.
neptune.visual: Clever·warm · Smile·sparkling inspiration · Colors: deep sea blue/starry purple · Elements: compass·stars·waves

demTopography.title: Terrain is the truth layer of travel planning
demTopography.description: TripNARA uses terrain as the truth layer. Slope, cumulative ascent, walking difficulty — no longer based on feeling.

professionalUsers.title: Who Uses TripNARA
professionalUsers.description: Verification · Qualification · Project Fit · Reputation — four independent layers, no composite credit score

websiteTrust.title: Trust & roles: how we decide who can lead
websiteTrust.subtitle: No composite credit score and no stranger ratings. Verification, qualification, project fit, and reputation are separate and inspectable.
websiteTrust.noCreditScore: We do not show composite credit scores or integrate third-party credit scores.

verification.title: Verification
verification.description: Phone, email, real name, and age checks. Proves who you are — not whether you are qualified to lead or fit a specific project.

qualification.title: Qualification
qualification.description: Professional (individual) and Agency (organization) certification. Background and compliance review determines whether you can publish Trusted Projects.

projectFit.title: Project Fit
projectFit.description: Four-dimension assessment per Trusted Project (intent, capability, pace, risk tolerance). Results are tiered — not a 0–100 composite score.

reputation.title: Reputation
reputation.description: Fact-based counts and records (e.g. completed projects, dispute outcomes). No composite stranger credit score or public leaderboard.

websiteTrust.rolesSubtitle: Subscription unlocks tools; Professional / Agency certification unlocks publishing; Organizer is a project-scoped role, not a membership tier.

traveler.title: Traveler
traveler.description: Plan private trips and apply to Trusted Projects. After identity verification, browse the market and submit project-fit assessments.

professional.title: Professional
professional.description: Individual guides, consultants, and leaders. After certification, apply for publishing permission and recruit via Trusted Projects.

agency.title: Agency
agency.description: Studios, travel companies, and expedition teams. After agency certification, members publish and manage projects in the organization context.

organizer.title: Organizer
organizer.description: Organizer/publisher role for a specific Trusted Project. Granted when you create or take over a project; history is retained after the trip ends.

trustedProjects.title: Trusted Projects replace public plaza recruitment
trustedProjects.description: Team formation happens through Trusted Projects: publishing requires certification and review; members join after project-fit assessment. Public plaza recruitment is discontinued.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.question1: Will TripNARA decide everything for me?
faq.answer1: No. We provide suggestions, evidence, and alternatives — the final call is yours.
faq.question2: Does TripNARA have a credit score?
faq.answer2: No. We do not show composite credit scores or rank strangers. Verification, Professional / Agency qualification, project-fit assessment, and reputation are four independent layers you can review in account governance.
faq.answer3: Traveler for personal planning and joining projects; Professional and Agency are certifications (review required); Organizer is the role within a specific Trusted Project. Subscription plans unlock tools — they do not replace professional or agency certification.
faq.question4: How do I publish a group trip?
faq.answer4: Create a listing under Trusted Projects. You need Professional or Agency certification plus publishing permission. Members apply after a project-fit questionnaire — public plaza recruitment is no longer used.

finalCTA.title: Turn dreams into routes you can finish — and teams you can trust

pathfinder.name: Professional Pro
pathfinder.description: Full toolkit for teams and agencies (certification separate)

closing.title:
We don't optimize trips or sell credit scores.
We help you avoid decisions you shouldn't make — and form verifiable teams.

product.title: TripNARA is a Route, Decision & Trust System

hero.line2: We help you judge whether a route should exist,
hero.line3: and when you need a team, match through Trusted Projects and project-fit assessment — not credit scores.
hero.subtitle: Route decisions + four-layer trust + Trusted Projects — no composite credit score.

modules.title: Core Product Modules
modules.subtitle: One decision logic from personal planning through Trusted Project team formation

module1.title: RouteDirection™
module1.sceneContent: Multi-region, multi-day trips with high uncertainty
module1.valueContent: Judge whether the route should exist before structure and schedules

module2.title: Executable Schedule Generation
module2.description: Transform routes into daily executable structures
module2.sceneContent: Trips needing precise timing and pace control
module2.valueContent: Balance transit, stops, and buffer so each day is completable

module3.title: Plan B Alternatives
module3.sceneContent: Weather, closures, fatigue, and other disruptions
module3.valueContent: Structured alternatives that preserve route integrity

module4.title: Risk & DEM
module4.sceneContent: Outdoor, high-altitude, and complex terrain routes
module4.valueContent: Real terrain data validates feasibility — not wishful planning

module5.title: Trusted Projects & Project Fit
module5.sceneContent: Leader recruitment, member applications, Organizer roster review
module5.valueContent: Four-layer trust + tiered fit results — replaces plaza recruitment and credit rankings

workflow.title: End-to-end workflow
workflow.step1: Judge whether the route should exist

workflow.step3Desc: Terrain and conditions checked; structured backups prepared

reliable.title: Why Reliable
reliable.firstPrinciplesDesc: Start from "should this route exist?" — not stacking more attractions
reliable.trustGovernanceDesc: Verification, qualification, project fit, and reputation are independent — no composite credit score
reliable.dataRigorousDesc: DEM terrain, weather, and decision logs support every judgment
reliable.aiStructureDesc: AI suggests; structured algorithms and tiered fit keep plans executable and explainable
reliable.expandTitle: TripNARA restores the core questions of travel and team formation:
reliable.expandPoint2: Can it be executed? (structure and pace)
reliable.expandPoint3: Is it safe and recoverable? (risk and Plan B)
reliable.expandPoint4: Is the team verifiable? (Trusted Projects + fit — not credit rankings)

teamOps.appeal: Appeals & disputes: fit appeals and reputation disputes

professionals.infrastructure: You are building verifiable leadership infrastructure — not a traffic platform, but a route and trust system

voice.title: Brand Voice & Tone Guide
voice.subtitle: TripNARA's voice = calm, reality-respecting, verifiable, always on humanity's side

not.title: Not
not.creditScore: Composite credit scores or stranger rating leaderboards

is.title: But
is.evidenceBased: Evidence-based judgment and tiered fit results

risk.title: When risks appear
risk.text: This route has significantly higher risk than average under current conditions. We recommend choosing a safer alternative.

rejection.title: When we need to refuse
rejection.text: For safety reasons, we won't recommend this route — and when project fit isn't sufficient, we won't place the wrong person on the team.

fit.title: When fit is insufficient
fit.text: Based on your pace and risk answers, this listing is currently tiered as "needs alignment." Talk with the Organizer first, or choose a better-matched listing.

success.title: When the journey succeeds
success.text: What truly makes the journey work is your commitment — plus verified team matching. We are your partner, not your score.

journey.title: Professional user journey
journey.subtitle: From certification to publishing, team formation, and in-trip execution

discovery.title: Understand four-layer trust
discovery.description: Enter TripNARA PRO and learn how verification, qualification, project fit, and reputation work independently — no composite credit score.

understanding.title: Certification & publishing permission
understanding.description: Apply for Professional or Agency certification and publishing permission. Subscription unlocks tools — it does not replace qualification review.

profile.title: Complete account governance
profile.description: Review four-layer trust status in account governance and submit verification or organization materials as needed.

routeDirection.title: Create a Trusted Project
routeDirection.description: Create a listing linked to a route template or existing trip — you become the Organizer for that project.

planning.title: Configure fit rules
planning.description: Set project-fit questionnaire, rule templates, deposit, and document requirements before submitting for review.

preparation.title: Review, publish & recruit
preparation.description: After listing approval, go public. Members browse the market, submit fit assessments, and apply to join.

execution.title: Roster review & in-trip execution
execution.description: Organizer reviews applications in the application center. Once the team is set, route planning, risk validation, and Abu/Dr.Dre/Neptune in-trip guardrails run together.

review.title: Close project & archive reputation
review.description: After the trip, the project archives. Reputation records and Organizer role history are retained for future listings.

manifesto.title: Brand Manifesto
manifesto.line1: TripNARA doesn't sell travel — we take seriously how routes should be walked and teams should be formed
manifesto.line3: trust should not be compressed into one score,
manifesto.line4: but split into verifiable, appealable, reviewable chains of responsibility.
manifesto.line5: When the route holds and the team matches, then we recommend.
manifesto.commitment: — This is our promise to professionals and members.

pricing.title: Clear, simple, no hidden fees
pricing.heroSubtitle: Subscription unlocks planning tools. Professional / Agency certification and Trusted Projects publishing are applied for separately — not included in the prices below.

certification.title: Qualification (separate application · not a subscription)
certification.description: To publish group listings on Trusted Projects, you need Professional or Agency certification plus publishing permission. Review is free and independent of subscription.
certification.professionalDesc: Guides, consultants, and individual leaders. Background and compliance review, then apply for publishing permission.
certification.agencyDesc: Studios, travel companies, and expedition teams. Members collaborate and publish in the organization context.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.cancelable: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq.cancelableAnswer: Yes. Pro and other plans are billed monthly and can be cancelled in account settings. Access continues through the current billing period.
faq.teamSupport: Is subscription the same as certification?
faq.teamSupportAnswer: No. Subscription unlocks planning tools. Professional / Agency certification determines whether you can publish Trusted Projects. Organizer is a project-scoped role when you create or take over a listing.
faq.dataPrivacy: What else is needed to publish a Trusted Project?
faq.dataPrivacyAnswer: Beyond Professional or Agency certification, you need publishing permission and listing review. Members join via project-fit assessment — no composite credit score or public ranking.
faq.countrySupport: What can the free plan do?
faq.countrySupportAnswer: Plan personal routes, browse the Trusted Projects market, submit fit assessments, and review four-layer trust information in account governance.

cta.hint: Not sure which plan fits? We can help with your route needs and certification path.

testimonial.quote: We thought planning was about where to go and who to travel with. TripNARA showed us what matters is whether the route holds and the team fits — without credit-score rankings.
testimonial.author: Student Z
testimonial.role: Iceland F-Road plan · Trusted Project member

about.title: We care not just about going to more places, but whether you truly finish a path — and lead a team that belongs on it.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: Make every departure and every team formation a decision worth making.

believe.title: We Believe
believe.point1: Travel is not about visiting more places — it's about walking the right path.
believe.point1Desc: A good journey is not stacking attractions; it's completing a process.
believe.point2: Routes are not assumed to exist — they must be validated and questioned.
believe.point2Desc: The first step is asking: should this route hold?
believe.point3: AI is a decision assistant, not a replacement for your judgment.
believe.point3Desc: Technology should serve reasoning, not replace it.
believe.point4: Direction before detail; structure before fragments.
believe.point4Desc: You need a better frame, not more information.
believe.point5: Good routes are executable, not idealized.
believe.point5Desc: Romance must land in reality to be real.
believe.point6: Trust should not be compressed into one score.
believe.point6Desc: Verification, qualification, project fit, and reputation stay independent and appealable — through Trusted Projects, not plaza recruitment.

recruiting.title: Recruiting
recruiting.text: If you also believe that travel is more than checking in, welcome to join us.

outdoor.title: Outdoor Route Expert / Travel Route Validator

recruiting.title: We're not looking for "employees" — we're looking for decision-makers.
recruiting.subtitle: Join us not to visit more places, but to walk the right path and build verifiable trust.
recruiting.intro: At TripNARA, we're not rushing features or traffic platforms. We ask: should this route exist, and should this team travel together?
recruiting.intro2: We want people who ask "should we build this?" — who treat four-layer trust and project fit as product core, not bolt-ons.
recruiting.intro3: If you're willing to treat your career as a real path choice, welcome to join us.

apply.title: How to Apply
apply.text: Please send us your resume, portfolio, or "judgments" you've made.
apply.note: 💬 You can also write a paragraph telling us: "Why did you choose this career path?"

product.tagline: We don't stack features — we judge needs with logic, including Trusted Projects and trust governance.
expectations: Familiar with System 1 / System 2 thinking models
Able to handle uncertain inputs and assist in judgment
Respect decision boundaries, not pursue universal models

data.tagline: We're not a KPI factory, we use data to prove paths are valid.
expectations: Skilled at structuring and quantifying ambiguous problems
Able to assess route risks, rhythm, and variables
Understand that data's role is to "support judgment", not "replace judgment"

geography.tagline: Maps are not decoration, but constraints for decisions.
expectations: Familiar with real terrain and route assessment (DEM / GIS preferred)
Understand the huge gap between armchair strategy and real feasibility
Able to tell us "which roads cannot be taken" is more important than "where to go"

ai.tagline: We don't use AI to generate routes, but a decision system that judges whether a route should exist.
expectations: Familiar with System 1 / System 2 thinking models
Able to handle uncertain inputs and assist in judgment
Respect decision boundaries, not pursue universal models

outdoor.tagline: Only after walking a road can you understand what those curves on the map mean.
expectations: Have walked various types of routes in person, with real route design experience
Able to make multi-dimensional judgments on routes: "rhythm", "risk", "alternatives", etc.
Transform experience into systematic input, not story sharing

design.tagline: Design is not "beautifying itineraries", but "expressing route judgments".
expectations: Skilled at visualizing complex concepts (philosophy, AI, structure) into user-understandable information
Understand the brand positioning of "design as judgment"
Preference for minimalist, structural design (focus on whitespace, sense of relationship)

closing.quote: 🛤️ Some roads aren't on the map, but you know they exist; some teams can't be ranked by credit scores, but you know if they fit.
closing.text: If you believe not every route should exist — and not every team should be formed by ranking — we might be missing exactly one person: you.

routeIntelligence.title: How should a route be understood?
routeIntelligence.subtitle: TripNARA's route philosophy — from personal decisions to trusted teams

corePoints.title: Five core principles
corePoints.point1: A route is not a list of attractions
corePoints.point1Desc: It is a structural path linking goals, pace, feasibility, and safety.
corePoints.point2Desc: If direction is wrong, no amount of detail reaches the goal.
corePoints.point3Desc: Ideas are beautiful; landing them is what makes travel happen.
corePoints.point4Desc: Variables always appear — the system must plan alternatives and slack.
corePoints.point5Desc: Leading and joining happen through Trusted Projects and tiered fit — no composite credit score or stranger rankings.

ai.title: What AI means to us
ai.subtitle: Not an AI toy — a decision and trust assistant
ai.description: TripNARA is not AI that stacks attraction recommendations. We build structured judgment for whether a route is worth walking and whether members fit a team — with four-layer trust and project fit, not composite credit scores.

manifesto.en: We decide whether a route should exist.
manifesto.zh: When we decide on a route, we also decide on a way of life.

login.title: Login
login.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
login.codeSent: Verification code sent. Please check your email.
login.sendCodeFailed: Failed to send verification code. Please try again.
login.codeHint: Please check your email inbox (and spam folder) for the verification code
login.emailAndCodeRequired: Please enter email and verification code
login.resendCodeHint: Please request a new verification code
login.googleDescription:
Sign in with Google to automatically save your route decision records
No password required, sync your routes across devices
login.terms: By continuing, you have read and agree to the <0>{{terms}}</0> and <1>{{privacy}}</1>
login.fallbackNote: Email OTP / Magic Link will be available as an alternative login method in the future
login.heroSubtitle: TripNARA — Where decisions meet the real world.

register.title: Register with Email
register.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
register.codeSent: Verification code sent. Please check your email.
register.sendCodeFailed: Failed to send verification code. Please try again.
register.codeHint: Please check your email inbox (and spam folder) for the verification code
register.emailAndCodeRequired: Please enter email and verification code
register.resendCodeHint: Please request a new verification code
register.termsHint: By registering, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

contentSave.title: Save Any Content, Anytime, Anywhere
contentSave.description1: Inspiration is everywhere. Besides uploading files, TripNARA also lets you capture ideas and save materials through browser plugins or mobile apps.
contentSave.description2: Supports PDFs, web pages, maps, routes, places, photos, and more.
contentSave.mobileAppDesc: Route planning assistant in your pocket

preferences.title: User Preferences
preferences.description: Set your travel preferences to help us recommend better trips for you
preferences.attractionTypesHint: Select your preferred attraction types (multiple selections allowed)
preferences.dietaryRestrictionsHint: Select your dietary restrictions (multiple selections allowed)
preferences.preferOffbeatHint: Whether you prefer to explore offbeat, non-mainstream attractions
preferences.travelPreferencesHint: Set your travel pace, budget, and accommodation preferences

footer.tagline: Route & decision system · four-layer trust · Trusted Projects

contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.description: We look forward to your feedback. You can report errors, ask questions, or share ideas with us.
contactUs.messagePlaceholder: Found an error or have a good idea to share......
contactUs.uploadImages: Upload images or paste images from the clipboard.
contactUs.clickToUpload: Click to upload or drag images
contactUs.messageOrImageRequired: Please enter a message or upload images
contactUs.sendSuccess: Message sent successfully! We will reply to you as soon as possible.
contactUs.sendFailed: Failed to send, please try again later

attentionQueue.title: Needs Attention
attentionQueue.empty: No items requiring attention for now

riskOverview.title: Risk Overview
riskOverview.bufferInsufficient: Lack of buffer may lead to a chain reaction of delays

cascade.title: Cascade impact
cascade.userConfirmationDisclaimer: These items require your action — TripNARA does not book on your behalf.
cascade.tabDescription: Read-only cascade snapshot; triggers score recalc when empty.
cascade.empty: No cascade snapshot yet. Resolve blockers or refresh score.

repair.consensusBlockedBody: Repair directions diverge significantly. TripNARA will not auto-apply. Review each stance before proceeding.
repair.forceProceed: I understand — show repair options anyway
repair.applyBlockedReason: No guardian consensus yet. Review stances before applying.

guardian.title: Guardian consensus
guardian.userBoundary: Final trade-offs require your confirmation; TripNARA will not book or rebook on your behalf.

page.clickFixToSeeOptions: Click "Fix" on a blocker to see repair options

evidenceCoverage.label: Evidence Coverage
evidenceCoverage.description: Evidence collection status for trip segments

transportCertainty.label: Transport Certainty
transportCertainty.description: Confirmation level of transport and bookings

safetyRisk.label: Safety & Risk
safetyRisk.description: Safety risk assessment for the trip

buffers.label: Buffers
buffers.description: Time buffers and flexibility in the trip

page.noDetailedFindings: No detailed findings. Score is calculated based on overall trip status.
page.scoreExplanation: The score reflects the overall health of this dimension and may be affected by various factors.
page.dataFormatError: Data format error, please refresh the page and try again
page.systemCapabilityPacks: System capability packs triggered for this trip
page.capabilityPacksDescription: System capability packs automatically triggered based on trip characteristics to help you prepare for special travel scenarios
page.noPacksTriggered: No capability packs triggered for this trip
page.addToChecklistPending: This feature requires backend support. Rules will be added to the preparation checklist.
page.addToChecklistFailed: Failed to add, please try again later
page.noSpecialPreparationHint: Your trip doesn't involve high altitude, remote areas, or seasonal roads
page.noCapabilityPackChecklist: No items yet. Add from the Capability Packs tab into your pre-trip checklist.
page.unifiedChecklistDescription: Tasks from the readiness assessment; items you add from Capability Packs appear below.
page.fullCoverage: All segments and POIs have evidence coverage
page.mapTokenHint: Please set VITE_MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN in your .env file
page.mapDataPending: Backend API in development, stay tuned
page.evidenceChainDescription: All evidence sources and their coverage

empty.title: No Packing List Yet
empty.description: Click the button below to generate a personalized packing list. The system will automatically infer season, route type, and other information based on your trip.

stats.title: Pending items
stats.safetyHint: You can keep planning; items below are safety and packing tips

risks.title: Destination risk reference
risks.hint: General destination risks for pre-trip planning — not the same as trip blockers.

actions.saveToLocalOnly: Saved to local only (backend sync failed)
actions.markNotApplicableFailed: Failed to mark, please try again
actions.addToLaterFailed: Failed to add, please try again
actions.removeFromLaterFailed: Failed to remove, please try again
actions.unmarkNotApplicableFailed: Failed to unmark, please try again

drawer.noItems: No preparation items to handle at the moment

welcomeModal.title: Let's make your first executable route.
welcomeModal.description: Choose a target experience and we'll recommend the best planning strategy for you

exploratory.title: Exploratory
exploratory.description: Default Neptune, stronger fault tolerance, flexible exploration

welcomeModal.demoHint: Demo is to let you see 'evidence + executable' in 3 minutes, not fill out forms

globalCommandBar.placeholder: Say something: I want to relax a bit more / put hiking in the morning / what if it rains today?

questionnaire.title: Understand Your Fitness Level
questionnaire.subtitle: Complete {{count}} simple questions for personalized trip recommendations
questionnaire.resultHint: After completing more trips, we'll automatically optimize your assessment based on your feedback

longest_hike.question: What's the longest hike you've completed?

profile.title: Fitness Profile
profile.defaultHint: You haven't completed the fitness assessment. Using default parameters.
profile.lowConfidenceHint: Complete more trips and submit feedback to improve assessment accuracy

feedback.title: Congratulations on completing your trip!
feedback.subtitle: Your feedback will help us plan better trips for you
feedback.question: How did you feel about this trip's intensity?
feedback.successHint: Your feedback will help us optimize future trip recommendations

prompt.title: Understand Your Fitness Level
prompt.message: Complete fitness assessment for personalized trip recommendations

terrain.title: Terrain Info
terrain.offSeasonWarning: Current month is not within the best season for this terrain. Please prepare accordingly and stay safe.

riskDescriptions.LOW: Safe for most hikers with basic preparation
riskDescriptions.HIGH: Advanced skills and technical gear required
riskDescriptions.CRITICAL: Expert level only. Life-threatening conditions possible.

criticalWarning.title: Critical Risk Warning
criticalWarning.description: This section poses serious safety risks. Only recommended for personnel with professional skills and equipment.

acclimatization.title: Altitude Acclimatization
acclimatization.description: Track your altitude adaptation progress for safer trip recommendations
acclimatization.noRecordsHint: Records will be created automatically after high-altitude trips (>2500m)
acclimatization.amsSensitivityHint: AMS sensitivity affects how the system recommends high-altitude trips.

advice.title: Acclimatization Advice
advice.content: Based on your acclimatization status, recommended daily sleeping altitude gain should not exceed {{gain}}m.

amsWarning.title: Altitude Sickness Warning
amsWarning.description: The system detected you may be experiencing altitude sickness symptoms.

guide.title: What is Altitude Acclimatization?
guide.description: Altitude acclimatization is the process by which your body gradually adapts to high-altitude environments.

trend.title: Fitness Trend
trend.description: Analysis of your fitness changes over the past {{days}} days
trend.insufficientDataHint: Complete more trips to unlock fitness trend analysis

timeline.title: Fitness Timeline
timeline.emptyHint: Records will appear here after completing questionnaires or submitting feedback

wearable.title: Activity Data Sync
wearable.description: Connect your fitness devices for more accurate assessment
wearable.disconnectDescription: Your activity data will no longer be synced.
wearable.whyConnectDescription: Connected devices provide real activity data for more accurate fitness assessment.

physicalGate.title: Reality constraint alert
physicalGate.dedupeNote: If the answer already covers this, you can read the cards as detail only.
physicalGate.blockedNoHeal: No automatic adjustment under current constraints — please edit the itinerary manually.
physicalGate.shiftDaysHint: Shifting {{days}} day(s) usually requires shifting other days by the same amount.

pendingActions.title: Adjustments awaiting your confirmation
pendingActions.disclaimer: Advice only — TripNARA does not book or rebook on your behalf.

travelOntology.title: Trip status
travelOntology.disclaimer: Summary of how the system understands your trip — you must confirm before any change is applied.
